allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: AMB Check - Ambulance Inspection System

Features:
- Authentication system with NextAuth v5 (4 roles)
- Multi-role inspection workflow (Driver, Equipment, Nurse, HOD)
- QR code scanning and generation
- HOD approval dashboard
- PDF export for inspection reports
- Inspection history with advanced filters
- Statistics dashboard with charts (Pie, Line, Bar)
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Bilingual interface (Thai/English)
- Mock data support for development
- Responsive design with Tailwind CSS

Tech Stack:
- Next.js 15 + TypeScript
- NextAuth v5
- Vercel Postgres
- Recharts, jsPDF, html2canvas
- html5-qrcode, qrcode.react

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add environment variables and deployment guide

- Add .env.example with all required variables
- Add DEPLOYMENT.md with step-by-step deployment instructions
- Generate secure NEXTAUTH_SECRET for production
- Include Vercel deployment guide
- Include database setup instructions
- Include troubleshooting section

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add comprehensive Settings page with database migration

Features added:
- Settings page with 3 tabs (Profile, System, Password)
- Profile management with role display
- System settings (language, notifications, auto-logout)
- Password change functionality
- Toggle switches for notification preferences
- Settings button in home page header
- Database migration script for Supabase
- Installed dotenv for environment variable loading

Settings includes:
- User profile editing
- Email display (read-only)
- Role badge display
- Language selection (Thai/English/Both)
- In-app and email notification toggles
- Inspection reminder setting
- Auto-logout timer (15/30/60 min or never)
- Password change with validation
- Logout in danger zone

Technical:
- Created /settings route
- Added to middleware allowed routes
- Migration script runs full SQL schema
- Works with Supabase Postgres database

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
